templates.name: Teimu (Reimu from Temu because we don't have the colors you see we make sure to take the template names seriously here, no but like seriously I thought a lot about it, and by the fact like half the colors don't even work on it i think it's a pretty fitting name, as it also includes Temu in there, aka low cost low quality stuf, I am glad that you are reading that because I'm someone who really likes adding way too much info on one line and break stuff)
